content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative self-improvement pipeline as a foundational scaffold for implementing multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning the single-stream iterative feedback loop into a multi-path refinement process where each perspective generates its own self-feedback that is then cross-aggregated across iterations. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data, while addressing the limitation of single-perspective blind spots that plague basic Self-Refine.
